items.name: hermes-codex-imagegen-skill
items.description: This skill allows you to generate images directly within Hermes Agent using the Codex CLI. If you have a paid subscription to ChatGPT, you can generate images via the Codex CLI without needing a separate API.

items.name: app-capture-truth
items.description: Codex skill for fast in-process mobile app request capture

items.name: langgraph-multi-agent-analytics
items.description: 传统数据分析 Agent 停留在“问答 + 工具调用”层面，存在口径不稳定、权限不可控、长任务上下文膨胀导致稳定性下降、人工介入后难以恢复工作流、结果缺少验证与审计等问题。针对这些痛点将原有多 Agent 原型升级为企业级分析工作流平台，围绕“语义治理、权限控制、执行风控、结果验证、断点恢复、可观测性”构建完整闭环，支持从用户提问到 SQL 执行、验证、报告交付的生产级分析流程。

items.name: ro-sync
items.description: Two-way Roblox Studio ⇄ filesystem sync + agent CLI. Scripts and Folders sync bidirectionally; the rest is mirrored read-only for LLMs via tree.json.

items.name: singbox-reality-hy2

items.name: qinglongidc
items.description: 一套基于 Next.js + Golang 的 IDC 财务业务一体化系统，全链路 AI 编写，功能仍在持续补完中。做它的原因也不复杂：有些系统饼画了太久、预告发了太多、上线却一拖再拖，那不如自己动手，先把该做的东西做出来。

items.name: PAIDEIA-codex
items.description: Exam-prep workspace for math/physics courses, ported to OpenAI Codex CLI. Bundled stdio MCP server (paideia-mcp) owns the heavy lifting: parallel vision ingest, strategy-grading of hand-written answer PDFs, course-index extraction. Byte-compatible on-disk layout with the Claude Code edition.

items.description: Qwen-Image-Edit-MultiRef extends Qwen-Image-Edit with multi-reference image conditioning and batch inference support. It enables users to input multiple reference images in a single prompt, run efficient batched generation.

items.name: credit-wise-loan-approval-
items.description: Models Used: • Logistic Regression • Naive Bayes • K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN) 📊 Compared the performance of these algorithms to identify the most suitable model for loan approval prediction. Among these, the Naive Bayes model achieved the best performance for this dataset. 🛠 Tech Stack: Python, Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, Matplotlib, Seaborn

items.name: bert-attention-tf2pytorch
items.description: Faithful PyTorch port of HuggingFace TFBertSelfAttention - dynamic shapes, masked, differentiable, 100/100 on the migration grader.
